nasb.text: And he displayed the riches of his royal glory and the splendor of his great majesty for many days, 180 days.

esv.text: while he showed the riches of his royal glory and the splendor and pomp of his greatness for many days, 180 days.

cnv.text: 他把自己尊榮之國的財富和偉大威風的榮華，向他們展現很多日子，共有一百八十天。

ccb.text: 整整一百八十天，他展示自己帝国的财富和王权的威荣。
